title: Uncharted Territory: No Prior Self-Referential Modification Without External Loss

content.finding: No published work has achieved self-referential modification without external loss functions or evaluation signals
content.evidence: Literature scan across Lenia, Neural CAs, POET, Schmidhuber self-referential systems, meta-learning CAs, and open-ended evolution. All use external objectives
implications: We are in uncharted territory with Principle II (adaptation from computation, not external measurement)
The Living Seed Stage 1-2 (alpha adapts via resp_z without external loss) may be novel
Expected: no existing solutions to reference, high failure rate, fundamental discoveries possible
